description_long: This is a large, round, tapered plant pot with a wide, thick rim and a deep interior cavity. The exterior is adorned with intricate, swirling golden patterns that resemble stylized waves and possibly mythical creatures, set against a dark brown, weathered ceramic surface. The rim and inner surface are glazed in a muted green, giving a subtle contrast to the earthy tones of the body. The pot's surface shows signs of age and use, with some discoloration and minor chipping near the base. The decorative motifs suggest an artisanal or traditional design, possibly inspired by East Asian or Mediterranean pottery. Its substantial size and robust build make it suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or courtyards.
description: A large, round, brown ceramic plant pot with golden decorative patterns and a green-glazed rim and interior. The pot features intricate swirling motifs and a weathered, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widest part of the pot with prominent golden swirling patterns and a clear view of the thick, green-glazed rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a long, dragon-like motif in gold, with the green interior and rim visible.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the tapering side of the pot, with less visible pattern and more of the plain brown ceramic surface.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuation of the swirling golden motif, with the pot's curvature and rim clearly visible.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in landscaped urban parks or public courtyards
attribute_decorative_pattern: golden swirling motifs and stylized waves
